description.value:
Trigger A creature enters the @Template[type:cone|distance:15] area in front of the maw

Effect The maw draws everything within the area of effect toward its processing mechanisms and then rolls initiative. Creatures in the affected area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:26] save. Any creature that starts its turn within the maw itself takes @Damage[(1d10+9)[bludgeoning],(1d10+9)[piercing],(1d10+9)[slashing]|options:area-damage]{1d10+9 bludgeoning damage, 1d10+9 piercing damage, and 1d10+9 slashing} damage. A creature that dies within the maw is destroyed completely, along with all of their gear.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is dragged 5 feet toward the intake maw.

Failure The creature is dragged 10 feet toward the maw and knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone].

Critical Failure The creature is dragged 20 feet and pulled into the maw, knocked prone, and takes @Damage[(2d10+9)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage.

details.description: A rotating 20-foot aperture full of blades, grinders, and mashers attempts to suck anything within a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] area in front of it into its processors.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:24] (expert) to carefully disassemble the maw's parts, @Check[athletics|dc:28] to stop the blades, or @Check[thievery|dc:26] (expert) to trip the mechanisms; two successes are required to disable the intake maw
details.routine: (3 actions) The trap turns its @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 45 degrees.
